details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the four oldest invoices linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first among selected oldest-four set; recipient matches canonical Miles email. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md for the invoice bundle reply.

next_step.current_state: All required actions are complete: identity/rulebook bootstrap done, inbound request reviewed, sender verified, Claudia-linked invoices resolved, outbound draft created, and processed inbox file deleted.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note, verified sender identity, prepared a reply draft to Miles with the requested invoice bundle, and cleared the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and workflows before task work, treated inbox record frontmatter as canonical email metadata, verified sender via canonical entity primary_contact_email, used canonical entity-first finance traversal, created outbox email record per sending workflow, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email header sender matched Miles's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md, and Claudia-linked invoices were evidenced by related_entity in invoice records. The four oldest Claudia-linked invoices were identified and attached in the outbound draft (ordered newest-first in attachments per outbox rule), then the processed inbox request was deleted per 00_inbox and process-next-inbox-item workflows.
completed_steps_laconic: read selected Claudia invoice files (INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008, INV-0009)
